tests.test_name: TestNG - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single TestNG test file and documenting it produces valid, complete JSON output with at least one named test.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system responds with visible documentation after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully resolved with no placeholders or missing data
At least one test entry is present in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by a name

tests.test_name: TestNG - PO - DataProvider expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven TestNG test using a DataProvider is expanded into one separate test entry per data row in the Product Owner output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system responds with visible documentation after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully resolved with no placeholders or missing data
The DataProvider rows are each expanded into individual test entries, producing multiple results

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is identifiable by a name

tests.test_name: TestNG - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single TestNG test file in the QA Manager role produces valid output that includes a populated test coverage matrix.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system responds with visible documentation after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully resolved with no placeholders or missing data
At least one test entry is present in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by a name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a populated coverage matrix for the test

tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven TestNG test is collapsed into a single test entry in the QA Manager view, with the coverage matrix reflecting all data rows using the correct schema.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system responds with visible documentation after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully resolved with no placeholders or missing data
The data-driven test is collapsed into a single entry rather than expanded per row

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test entry is identifiable by a name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row from the DataProvider is represented as a row in the coverage matrix

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for generic
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The structure of each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected generic schema
